name: Apricot Mustard-Glazed Chicken Breasts
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the mustard, apricot preserves, and ground ginger in a bowl until well mixed.
2. Brush some of the mustard mixture onto the chicken breasts.
3. Grill or broil the chicken, brushing it frequently with the remaining mustard mixture.
4. Cook until the chicken is thoroughly heated through and cooked to your desired level of doneness.
